title: Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates:
Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates!
